'''rangobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickock|hickock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickock|hickock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rangobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rængebeth|rængebeth]] || [[word:rængebej|rængebej]] || [[word:rængebesh|rængebesh]] || [[word:rængebe|rængebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangongoboth|rangongoboth]] || [[word:rangongoboj|rangongoboj]] || [[word:rangongobosh|rangongobosh]] || [[word:rangongobo|rangongobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangoboth|rangoboth]] || [[word:rangoboj|rangoboj]] || [[word:rangobosh|rangobosh]] || [[word:rangobo|rangobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangofboth|rangofboth]] || [[word:rangofboj|rangofboj]] || [[word:rangofbosh|rangofbosh]] || [[word:rangofbof|rangofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rangobotho|rangobotho]] || [[word:rangobojo|rangobojo]] || [[word:rangobosho|rangobosho]] || [[word:rangoboko|rangoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rangoboth|rangoboth]] || [[word:rangoboj|rangoboj]] || [[word:rangobosh|rangobosh]] || [[word:rangobo|rangobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rangobothol|rangobothol]] || [[word:rangobojol|rangobojol]] || [[word:rangoboshol|rangoboshol]] || [[word:rangobokol|rangobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rangobothotho|rangobothotho]] || [[word:rangobojojo|rangobojojo]] || [[word:rangoboshosho|rangoboshosho]] || [[word:rangoboko|rangoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rangobothon|rangobothon]] || [[word:rangobojon|rangobojon]] || [[word:rangoboshon|rangoboshon]] || [[word:rangobokon|rangobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rangobothoro|rangobothoro]] || [[word:rangobojoro|rangobojoro]] || [[word:rangoboshoro|rangoboshoro]] || [[word:rangobokoro|rangobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
